description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a fitted black short-sleeve shirt and dark cargo-style pants with visible knee patches, secured with a belt. His forearms are covered in tattoos, adding a distinctive urban character. The figure wears dark shoes with a low profile, suitable for walking on city streets. The facial features are neutral, and the overall build is average, with a realistic human body proportion. The clothing and posture suggest a casual, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A bald adult male in a T-pose, wearing a black shirt, dark cargo pants, and dark shoes, with tattooed forearms and a casual urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, tattooed forearms, and full frontal details of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and cargo pants with knee patches
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
